verses.text: 'I am jealous for Zion'; I will dwell in Jerusalem, and it shall be called 'a city of truth.' Returning glory. God purposes to make His city holy again.
'I am jealous for Zion'; I will dwell in Jerusalem, and it shall be called 'a city of truth.' Returning glory. God purposes to make His city holy again.
'I am jealous for Zion'; I will dwell in Jerusalem, and it shall be called 'a city of truth.' Returning glory. God purposes to make His city holy again.
Old men and women shall again sit in the streets, and boys and girls shall play there. Picture of peace. Restored Jerusalem is full of age and youth at rest.
Old men and women shall again sit in the streets, and boys and girls shall play there. Picture of peace. Restored Jerusalem is full of age and youth at rest.
If this seems marvellous to the remnant, 'should it also be marvellous in mine eyes?' He will gather His people. Nothing too hard. What looks impossible to men is easy with God.
If this seems marvellous to the remnant, 'should it also be marvellous in mine eyes?' He will gather His people. Nothing too hard. What looks impossible to men is easy with God.
If this seems marvellous to the remnant, 'should it also be marvellous in mine eyes?' He will gather His people. Nothing too hard. What looks impossible to men is easy with God.
Let your hands be strong, ye that hear; before these days there was no hire nor peace. Encouragement. The discouraged are urged to take heart and work.
Let your hands be strong, ye that hear; before these days there was no hire nor peace. Encouragement. The discouraged are urged to take heart and work.
Now He will not deal as before; the seed shall prosper, and 'as ye were a curse... so will I save you, and ye shall be a blessing.' Reversed lot. God turns His people from a byword into a blessing.
Now He will not deal as before; the seed shall prosper, and 'as ye were a curse... so will I save you, and ye shall be a blessing.' Reversed lot. God turns His people from a byword into a blessing.
Now He will not deal as before; the seed shall prosper, and 'as ye were a curse... so will I save you, and ye shall be a blessing.' Reversed lot. God turns His people from a byword into a blessing.
As He purposed to punish and relented not, so now He purposes 'to do well unto Jerusalem: fear ye not.' Sure mercy. The God faithful in judgment is faithful in blessing.
As He purposed to punish and relented not, so now He purposes 'to do well unto Jerusalem: fear ye not.' Sure mercy. The God faithful in judgment is faithful in blessing.
Speak truth, judge truly, love no false oath, for 'all these are things that I hate.' Truth required. The God who blesses calls His people to honesty and justice.
Speak truth, judge truly, love no false oath, for 'all these are things that I hate.' Truth required. The God who blesses calls His people to honesty and justice.
The fasts shall become 'joy and gladness'; therefore love truth and peace. Mourning into joy. God turns days of grief into festivals for the faithful.
The fasts shall become 'joy and gladness'; therefore love truth and peace. Mourning into joy. God turns days of grief into festivals for the faithful.

Many nations shall come to seek the LORD; 'ten men... shall take hold... of the skirt of... a Jew, saying, We will go with you; for... God is with you.' Ingathering. The nations are drawn to the people among whom God dwells.
